title: Mock Test 45 - Idioms (Set 2)
description: Idioms (Set 2) নিয়ে ২০টি প্রশ্ন। Let the cat out of the bag, Burn the midnight oil, When pigs fly, Spill the beans, Hit the sack, Bite the bullet, The ball is in your court, Call it a day ইত্যাদি।

questions.question: 'Let the cat out of the bag' অর্থ কী?
questions.explanation: 'Let the cat out of the bag' = reveal a secret accidentally।

questions.question: 'Burn the midnight oil' অর্থ কী?
questions.explanation: 'Burn the midnight oil' = study/work late into the night।

questions.question: 'When pigs fly' অর্থ কী?
questions.explanation: 'When pigs fly' = something that will never happen (অসম্ভব)।

questions.question: 'Spill the beans' অর্থ কী?
questions.explanation: 'Spill the beans' = reveal a secret।

questions.question: 'Bite the bullet' অর্থ কী?
options: কঠিন কিছু সাহসের সাথে মোকাবিলা করা
questions.explanation: 'Bite the bullet' = face a difficult situation with courage।

questions.question: She ___ and everyone knew about the party.
questions.explanation: গোপন ফাঁস → 'let the cat out'।

questions.question: He ___ to pass the final exam.
questions.explanation: রাত জেগে পড়া → 'burned the midnight oil'।

questions.question: I'll clean my room ___ — meaning never!
questions.explanation: 'When pigs fly' = never।

questions.question: Come on, ___! Tell me what happened.
questions.explanation: 'Spill the beans' = গোপন বলো।

questions.question: I decided to ___ and tell him the truth.
questions.explanation: সাহস করে সত্য বলা → 'bite the bullet'।

questions.question: Error: 'He burned the midnight oil by sleeping early.' — ভুল?
options: বিরোধ (burn oil = রাত জেগে কাজ, sleeping = তাড়াতাড়ি ঘুম)
questions.explanation: 'Burn the midnight oil' = রাত জেগে কাজ, 'sleeping early' = তাড়াতাড়ি ঘুম — বিপরীত।

questions.question: Error: 'She let the cat out by keeping the secret.' — ভুল?
options: let out = ফাঁস, keeping = রাখা — বিরোধ
questions.explanation: 'Let the cat out' = গোপন ফাঁস, 'keeping the secret' = গোপন রাখা — বিপরীত।

questions.question: Error: 'I'll do it when pigs fly' — বক্তা কী বোঝাচ্ছেন?
questions.explanation: 'When pigs fly' = never / অসম্ভব।

questions.question: Error: 'He spilled the beans and kept the surprise a secret.' — ভুল?
options: spilled = ফাঁস, kept secret = গোপন রাখা — বিরোধ
questions.explanation: 'Spilled the beans' = গোপন ফাঁস → surprise আর secret থাকে না! বিরোধ।

questions.question: Fill: 'She ___ the bullet and told her parents the accident.'
questions.explanation: 'Bite the bullet' — past = bit।

questions.question: Fill: 'Don't ___ the beans! It's a surprise.'
questions.explanation: 'Spill the beans' = গোপন ফাঁস করা।

questions.question: Fill: 'I need to ___ the midnight oil tonight.'
questions.explanation: 'Burn the midnight oil' = রাত জেগে কাজ করা।

questions.question: Fill: 'He'll apologize when ___ fly.'
questions.explanation: 'When pigs fly' = কখনোই না।

questions.question: অনুবাদ: 'সে গোপন কথাটা ফাঁস করে দিয়েছে।'
questions.explanation: 'Let the cat out' = গোপন ফাঁস।

questions.question: অনুবাদ: 'কঠিন কাজটা সাহসের সাথে মোকাবিলা করলাম।'
questions.explanation: 'Bite the bullet' = সাহসের সাথে কঠিন পরিস্থিতি মোকাবিলা।
